ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "varnum" INTEGER /* Variable number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the variable */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., Character, Numeric) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for numeric variables */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the variable */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for numeric variables */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for numeric variables */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the variable */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicate if the variable is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the value belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the variable for the state */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data value */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicate if the data value is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from where the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicate if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)
